subcodes.first_line: Rejoice in thine inmost soul and exult in the very essence of thy being, then detach thyself from all that hath been created in the past and all that shall be fashioned in the future
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشر فی نفسک لنفسک ثم اسرر لذاتک فی ذاتک ثم انقطع عن کل ما خلق من قبل و یخلق من
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @love of God
